name: nextjs
description: Next.js App Router preset for Claude Code

claudeMd.content:
## Next.js Conventions

- Always use App Router (`app/` directory), not Pages Router
- Components are Server Components by default; add `"use client"` only when you need browser APIs, event handlers, or React state/effects
- Use `next/image` for all images (automatic optimization) and `next/link` for client-side navigation
- API endpoints go in Route Handlers at `app/api/` (e.g., `app/api/users/route.ts`)
- Prefer Server Actions for data mutations over API routes when possible
- Use `loading.tsx` for streaming/suspense fallbacks, `error.tsx` for error boundaries, and `not-found.tsx` for 404 states in each route segment
- Collocate related files in the same directory: component, styles, tests, and utilities together
- Use `generateMetadata` or `metadata` export for per-page SEO
- Fetch data in Server Components using `async/await` directly; avoid `useEffect` for data fetching
- Use `revalidatePath` or `revalidateTag` for on-demand ISR cache invalidation
